CustomField.formula:
IF( ISBLANK(ProjectProduct__r.ProductName__c), ProjectProduct__r.Product__r.Product_Name__c & " ", ProjectProduct__r.ProductName__c & " " ) & IF( ISBLANK(Text(Type__c)), "", Text(Type__c) & " " ) &
IF( ISBLANK(Text(Currency__c)), "", Text(Currency__c)& " " ) &
IF( Text(DividendPolicy__c) = "Accumulating", "Acc ", IF( Text(DividendPolicy__c)= "Distributing", CASE( DividendFrequency__c, "Monthly", "Mdis ", "Quarterly", "Qdis ", "SemiAnnually", "Sdis ", "Annually", "Ydis ", "" ), "" ) ) &
IF(Text(CurrencyHedging__c )= "True", "Hdg", "" )
CustomField.label: Share Class Name
